mapper.sql: semester_id, school_year, term, case term when 1 then '上学期' when 2 then '下学期' end as term_name, start_date, end_date, is_current
mapper.select:
select
from semester where is_current = 1 order by semester_id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into semester (school_year, term, start_date, end_date, is_current) values (#{schoolYear}, #{term}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{isCurrent})
mapper.update: update semester set school_year = #{schoolYear}, term = #{term}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, is_current = #{isCurrent} where semester_id = #{semesterId}

update semester set is_current = 0 where is_current = 1
and semester_id != #{semesterId}
